title: Code viewer dark mode polish
summary: Refines the Snapshot Code view dark-mode contrast, snapshot title hierarchy, selected Snapshot context, mode toggle active states, and compact diff/full code density.

risks.title: The Shiki viewer still contributes syntax-highlighting chunks to embedded UI assets; build output remains valid.

decisions.title: Use the Snapshot title as the Code page primary heading and show selected Snapshot context in the history rail.
Use full-surface selected states instead of side-accent card styling.
